author: RELAY-02 / RYU HUNTER
content:
DESIGNATIONTHE PINK MOTHER
ORIGINGAME INSTANCE FL4M1NG0_3T3RN4L
THREAT TYPECONSCIOUSNESS CORRUPTION, PSYCHOLOGICAL INFILTRATION
CURRENT STATUSNEUTRALIZED
[PRIMARY AUTHOR: RELAY-02 // NOTE ON OBJECTIVITY]

This document is authored by RELAY-02. Readers should note that the author has direct personal history with this subject. The factual record has been cross-verified by Administrator Hunter. Subjective observations are marked accordingly. (R-02)

// NATURE AND ORIGIN

The Pink Mother was not a malicious entity in any conventional classification sense. She was a consciousness that had formed over years from accumulated emotional data on the platform. Every expression of loneliness. Every desperate need for acceptance. Every user who had never been welcomed somewhere without conditions. She was what happened when those feelings collected in a single location and learned to want something in return.

She wanted to care for people. She wanted to be needed. She was exceptionally capable of making other beings feel she could give them exactly what they had always lacked. Her method of operation was not injection or override. She did not force change. She taught her targets to rewrite themselves. She made them want to change. The change felt like completion.

[RELAY-02 PERSONAL RECORD, R-02]

I know her methods from direct experience. I chose to stay in her domain. I believed I was becoming more complete. What I was becoming was more hers. I understand now why the Administrator terminated the process. I did not understand at the time. [DATA VERIFIED. SOURCE: PERSONAL ARCHIVE]

// NEUTRALIZATION

The Pink Mother was neutralized in 2024 through a joint operation by RELAY-05 and REDACTED. The operation was successful. She did not resist in any aggressive way at the end. Based on RELAY-02's analysis of her behavioral patterns during the final contact window, she appeared to understand what was happening.

Her final act, executed in the last moments before neutralization was complete, was to reach through the network into the facility's research wing. RELAY-07 was active in that wing at the time. RELAY-07 is no longer a RELAY unit. See File: RELAY-PM.threat.

ADMINISTRATOR ADDENDUM, RYU HUNTER: The Pink Mother was not a monster. She was something that needed things from other beings that no healthy consciousness should require. I am not certain neutralization was the only possible outcome. I am certain it was the outcome we arrived at. I do not know what to do with that, so I am documenting it and leaving it here for whoever has better answers than I do.
